goal: is_continuous_at[X, Y](f, x) = forall(x0: Set[Y]) { is_neighborhood(x0, f(x)) implies is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0), x) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { forall(x2: Set[T0]) { not is_neighborhood[T0](x2, x0(x1)) or is_neighborhood[T1](set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x2), x1) } = is_continuous_at[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Y, X](f, x)

compose[X, Y, Z](g, f, x) = g(f(x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[X, Y, Z](g, f, x)

is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](compose[X, Y, Z](g, f), w), x)

is_continuous_at[X, Z](c, x) = forall(x0: Set[Z]) { is_neighborhood(x0, c(x)) implies is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](c, x0), x) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { forall(x2: Set[T0]) { not is_neighborhood[T0](x2, x0(x1)) or is_neighborhood[T1](set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x2), x1) } = is_continuous_at[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Z, X](c, x)

goal: c(x) = compose[X, Y, Z](g, f, x)
p = function(x0: Set[Z]) { is_neighborhood(x0, c(x)) implies is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](c, x0), x) }
proof: exists(k0: Set[Z]) { p(k0) != (not is_neighborhood(k0, c(x)) or is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](c, k0), x)) }
let w0: Set[Z] satisfy { function(x0: Set[Z]) { not is_neighborhood(x0, c(x)) or is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](c, x0), x) }(w0) != p(w0) }
function(x0: Set[Z]) { (not is_neighborhood(x0, c(x)) or is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](c, x0), x)) = p(x0) }(w0)

function(x0: Set[Z]) { (not is_neighborhood(x0, c(x)) or is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](c, x0), x)) = p(x0) }(w)

goal: is_continuous_at[X, Z](c, x)
proof: let w0: Set[Z] satisfy { is_neighborhood(w0, c(x)) and not is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](c, w0), x) }
function(x0: Set[Z]) { (not is_neighborhood(x0, c(x)) or is_neighborhood(set_preimage[X, Z](c, x0), x)) = p(x0) }(w0)
